productDisplayName: Puma Men Pop Art Black Flip Flops
description: This energetic pair of Pop Art flip flops from puma are a great choice for casual wear. The straps, along with the designed footbed, add up for maximum impact. The circular grooves on the outsole offer grippy support, making this pair perfect for the pool side or the beach. Team it with jeans and tees from myntra for that casual look. Upper Quick-drying EVA upper for dry comfort for the feet Thong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and to add comfort and style Soft, cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Brand name printed on the footbed for style Outsole TPU outsole with round suction points all over for grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
